_comment: Copy this file to projects.json and fill in your own values.

example-project.description: A short description of this project's purpose

example-webhook-project.description: A workflow engine queried via webhook

sources.name: workflow-engine
sources.purpose: workflow execution records queried through webhook

_schema_docs.queryBackend: sls | cls | tls | webhook — usually same as vendor, can be overridden per-env
_schema_docs.downstream: list of project names this project calls
_schema_docs.keywords: words that identify this project in cross-project log mentions
_schema_docs.multiEnvs: array of env names to expand into when querying (e.g. ['prod', 'prod-secondary-region'])
_schema_docs.taskPatterns: array of {type, regex} for taskId format recognition
_schema_docs.envs.<env>.region: cloud region string — used to build SDK endpoints
_schema_docs.envs.<env>.vendorOverride: override project-level vendor for this env
_schema_docs.envs.<env>.backendOverride: override project-level queryBackend for this env
_schema_docs.sources[].name: log store name / topic ID
_schema_docs.sources[].layer: architectural layer (api, queue, workflow, data, etc.)
